title: Calendar Range
description: Calendar Range component enables users to select a range of dates using two synchronized calendar views. It provides an intuitive interface for date range selection with visual indicators for start, end, and in-between dates, making it perfect for booking systems, date filters, and scheduling applications.

sections.title: Disabled & Holiday Dates
sections.description: Disable dates and highlight holidays using disabledDates and holidayDates.

sections.title: Depth
sections.description: Switch between day, month, and year via depth.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier for the calendar range component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: interface
props.description: Determines the component interface mode. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: rtl
props.description: Enables right-to-left layout for the calendar range component.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Determines whether the calendar range is read-only. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: value
props.description: The selected date range value with from and end dates. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: disabled

props.name: type
props.description: Specifies the calendar system (gregorian, solar-hijri). Deprecated: prefer configuring the calendar globally via locale profile. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: count
props.description: Specifies the count of months to be displayed in the calendar range. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.
